note: Watchlist for the Code-Radar robot (scripts/ingest-codes.mjs). ADD A SOURCE = ADD ONE ENTRY here. For podcasts you only need `name` (+ optional `athleteId` if it's a pro's own show); the robot auto-resolves the RSS feed via the iTunes lookup. Set `rss` to pin an exact feed, or `country` (default DE) to disambiguate. `type` 'youtube' / 'affiliate' handlers come in later stages — same file, just new entries.
